channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Expo pursues industry solutions
item.description: Tapiwa Chirume THE Ministry of Industry and Commerce has part­nered local economic think tank Africa Economic Development Strategies to host the Zimbabwe... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Su via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Zimra to auction 24 impounded vehicles
item.description: Masimba Makwembere THE Zimbabwe Revenue Authority (Zimra) has an­nounced that it will auction 24 unclaimed vehicles and assorted goods impounded at Beitbridge... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choic via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Zimbabwe seeks coordinated biodiversity financing
item.description: Yvonne Ncube In BULAWAYO ZIMBABWE is stepping up ef­forts to strengthen biodiversity conservation through coordinat­ed financing and community-centred development initiatives. Addressing a... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Pension fund-backed solar power plant commissioned in Kwekwe
item.description: It will add 10MW to grid with target of 100MW when project complete The post Pension fund-backed solar power plant commissioned in Kwekwe appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. via Zimbabwean News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Two million euro boost for Zimbabwe conservation
item.description: via The Herald ZW #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Junior Editorial Coordinator — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
